'''chalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:saleably|saleably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saleably|saleably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chalate|chalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chalatesher|chalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalatesherĂ«m|chalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chalatero|chalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chalateshĂ«|chalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalateshĂ«m|chalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichalatero|gokichalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichalateshĂ«|gokichalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalateshĂ«m|gokichalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochalankerom|gochalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochalankeshĂ«|gochalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalankeshĂ«m|gochalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochalankeya|gochalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chalaterom|chalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalatemu|chalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chalateya|chalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichalaterom|gokichalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalatemu|gokichalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichalateya|gokichalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chalalate|chalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chalalatesher|chalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalalatesherĂ«m|chalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chalalatero|chalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chalalateshĂ«|chalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalalateshĂ«m|chalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichalalatero|gokichalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichalalateshĂ«|gokichalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalalateshĂ«m|gokichalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochalalankerom|gochalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochalalankeshĂ«|gochalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochalalankeshĂ«m|gochalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochalalankeya|gochalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chalalaterom|chalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chalalatemu|chalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chalalateya|chalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichalalaterom|gokichalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichalalatemu|gokichalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichalalateya|gokichalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠte|chĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠtesher|chĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠtero|chĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠtero|gokichĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠterom|chĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠtemu|chĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠlĂŠteya|chĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠterom|gokichĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠlĂŠteya|gokichĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chaflafte|chaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chaflaftesher|chaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaflaftesherĂ«m|chaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chaflaftero|chaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chaflafteshĂ«|chaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaflafteshĂ«m|chaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichaflaftero|gokichaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichaflafteshĂ«|gokichaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichaflafteshĂ«m|gokichaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochaflafnkerom|gochaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochaflafnkeshĂ«|gochaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochaflafnkeshĂ«m|gochaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochaflafnkeya|gochaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chaflafterom|chaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaflaftemu|chaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chaflafteya|chaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichaflafterom|gokichaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichaflaftemu|gokichaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichaflafteya|gokichaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
